character_dossiers.name: George
character_dossiers.biography: Mutineer who accuses John Silver of bungling the cruise and conspiring with others to undermine him.

character_dossiers.name: John Silver
character_dossiers.biography: Claims to be the captain, defends his actions, and presents a chart as evidence of his leadership.

character_dossiers.name: Morgan
character_dossiers.biography: Mutineer who intervenes in the argument between George and Silver.

character_dossiers.name: Anderson
character_dossiers.biography: Mentioned as one of the conspirators who undermined Silver's authority.

character_dossiers.name: Hands
character_dossiers.biography: Mentioned as a conspirator who undermined Silver's authority.

character_dossiers.name: the captain
character_dossiers.biography: Possessed a chest containing a chart, which was later given to John Silver by the doctor.

character_dossiers.name: the doctor
character_dossiers.biography: Gave the chart from the captain's chest to John Silver.
